units.content: Analysis engine with functions for convergence, correlation, GMM, speciation, provenance, clusters, validation
Direct translation of analysis.ts (1229 lines)
Code imports Universe, EntityID, CouplingEntry, CouplingSource and physical constants (C, G, H_PLANCK, CMB_TEMP, SOLAR_MASS, etc.)
Function analyze_rotation_gap retrieves rotation observation data from universe for entity id
Predicted velocity derived from disk enclosed mass and gravitational physics
Missing mass calculated as discrepancy between required mass and observed luminous mass
Function analyze_hubble_gap retrieves redshift data for entity
Comoving distance computed using three different Hubble constant values (Planck, Freedman, Shoes)
Hubble gap calculated as percentage difference between Planck and Shoes distances
Function analyze_compact_object receives mass and distance list in Schwarzschild radii units
Schwarzschild radius computed from mass
Gravitational time dilation factor computed for each distance
Function analyze_cmb computes CMB properties from constants (temperature, wavelength constants)
Peak wavelength derived from Wien's displacement law
Peak frequency and photon energy computed from wavelength and Planck constant
Function analyze_self_modeling_limit receives entity name, energy, radius, entity count, bits per entity, and optimality factor
Bekenstein bound computed from radius and energy
Maximum entities modelable derived from Bekenstein bound and bits per entity
Maximum recursion depth computed from logarithmic relationship of Bekenstein bound
Function analyze_universe_bekenstein uses fixed radius (46.5e9 ly) and energy (4.68e69 J) for observable universe
Universal Bekenstein bound computed from universe-scale radius and total energy
Function analyze_entity retrieves name, tags, frequency, and mass data for entity from universe
Entity is theoretical if 'theoretical' tag is present
Unbound energy entity lacks proper clock if has frequency but no mass
Function analyze_coupling_convergence iterates through universe coupling entries
Source filter optionally applied to coupling entries
Mean value computed across all measurements for entity-property pair
Spread computed as max minus min value
Relative spread computed as spread divided by absolute mean
Convergence status determined by comparing relative spread to thresholds
Measurement count and prediction count tallied from coupling sources
Convergence type classified as measurement-only, prediction-only, measurement-prediction, or insufficient
Function analyze_prediction_consensus filters coupling entries where source is 'prediction'
Consensus value and spread computed across multiple pipeline predictions
Consensus status determined as consensus or split based on relative spread threshold
